data.name: VSMEF015_Title
data.value: Metadata view interface should be source-generated
data.comment: {Locked="MetadataView"} The attribute name should not be localized.

data.name: VSMEF015_MessageFormat
data.value: The metadata view interface "{0}" is declared in this compilation but will not be source-generated. Annotate it with [MetadataView] and declare it partial.
data.comment: {Locked="[MetadataView]"} The attribute name in brackets should not be localized.

data.name: VSMEF016_Title
data.value: Referenced metadata view interface should be source-generated
data.comment: {Locked="MetadataView"} The attribute name should not be localized.

data.name: VSMEF016_MessageFormat
data.value: The metadata view interface "{0}" is declared in referenced assembly "{1}" and does not have [MetadataViewImplementation]. Recompile that assembly with [MetadataView] applied to the interface.
data.comment: {Locked="[MetadataViewImplementation]"} {Locked="[MetadataView]"} The attribute names in brackets should not be localized.

data.name: VSMEF017_Title
data.comment: {Locked="[MetadataView]"} The attribute name in brackets should not be localized.

data.name: VSMEF017_MessageFormat
data.value: Apply [MetadataView] only to partial metadata view interfaces whose containing types are also partial and whose members are get-only non-indexer properties.
data.comment: {Locked="[MetadataView]"} The attribute name in brackets should not be localized.
